zh.Of, Leighton, Montgomery, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Orreby於1251年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Fulk de Orreby21歲，母親Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby13歲。她和Peter Corbet至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1317年10月20日在英國戴文希爾維頓享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Orreby于1251年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Fulk de Orreby21岁，母亲Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby13岁。她和Peter Corbet至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1317年10月20日在英国戴文希爾維頓享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Orreby was born in 1251, in Shropshire, England, her father, Fulk de Orreby, was 21 and her mother, Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, was 13. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Peter Corbet. She died on 20 October 1317, in Silverton, Devon, England, at the age of 66.

fr.Of, Leighton, Montgomery, Wales: Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Orreby est née en 1251, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk de Orreby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, avait 13 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Peter Corbet. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1317, à Silverton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Orreby 1251 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulk de Orreby 21 und ihre Mutter Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby 13. Sie hatte mit Peter Corbet mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1317 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Silverton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Orreby è nata il nel 1251 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Fulk de Orreby, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, aveva 13 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Peter Corbet. Morì il 20 ottobre 1317, nel Silverton, Devon, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Orrebyが1251年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Fulk de Orrebyは21歳，母Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalbyは13歳であった。彼女はPeter Corbetとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1317年10月20日にイギリスデボンシルバートンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Orreby(이)가 1251년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk de Orreby(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 Peter Corbet(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 10월 20일 영국 데폰 실버턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Orreby nasceu em 1251, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk de Orreby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, tinha 13 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Peter Corbet. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1317, em Silverton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Orreby родилась в 1251 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Fulk de Orreby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, 13. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Peter Corbet. Она умерла 20 октября 1317 г. в местности сильвиртон, девон, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Orreby nació en 1251, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk de Orreby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Philippa le Strange - Heiress of Dalby, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Peter Corbet. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1317, en Silverton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
